description: Generate production-ready SVG vector images from text prompts. Recraft V4's design taste applied to vector output — clean geometry, structured layers, and editable paths.

size.description: Width and height of the generated image. Size is ignored if an aspect ratio is set.

prompt.title: Prompt
prompt.description: Text prompt for image generation (up to 10,000 characters)

aspect_ratio.description: Aspect ratio of the generated image
